message:
feat(conformance): add graph isomorphism conformance testing

Add conformance tests for graph isomorphism algorithms comparing Rust
implementation against Python NetworkX:
- is_isomorphic - full isomorphism check with VF2-style backtracking
- could_be_isomorphic - quick check based on degree sequences
- faster_could_be_isomorphic - fastest heuristic check

Fixtures cover:
- Isomorphic graphs (triangle with pendant, relabeled)
- Non-isomorphic graphs (different structure)
- Same node/edge count but not isomorphic (square vs star)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
